offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, exceeding vendor credit limits causes cash flow gaps. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Exceeding vendor credit limits leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar issues
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Join forums where Amazon sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try alert notifications and credit limit tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
